name: ​Dubsado
description:
What Dubsado Does

​Dubsado is built for white glove agencies. If you charge $5,000 for a website project or $2,000 per month for high-end strategy retainers, the presentation of your process matters. Dubsado lets you create interactive, fully branded proposals that feel like mini sales pages and reinforce a premium client experience.

Source: Dubsado

​Key Features

  • ​Interactive Proposals: Allows clients to select a package, sign the contract, and pay the deposit on one screen.
  • ​Client Portals: A dedicated, branded space where clients see every invoice and contract. It includes 3 additional users for free on most plans.
  • ​Workflow Automation: Triggers like “Send 'Welcome Guide' once contract is signed” help you look organized from day one.

​Benefits of Dubsado

  • ​Higher Close Rates: When your proposals look this professional, you can justify higher price points.
  • ​Seamless Onboarding: It removes the friction between a “yes” and a signed contract.
  • Track Progress: Identify revenue patterns, compare month-by-month goals, and pipeline health.

​Pricing

  • ​Starter Plan: $35/month 
  • ​Premier Plan: $55/month.
  • ​Add-on Brands: $10/month per additional brand.

Discounts are available on annual billing.

​Pros

​✅ The gold standard for branded, interactive proposals.

✅ Very affordable for solo or small boutique agencies.

​Cons

​🚫 No fulfillment tools (you still need separate software for SEO/Ads).

🚫 Automation does not scale well for very large teams (30+ users).

‍
what_people_say:
What Customers Say

“It’s brilliant for keeping contracts, invoices, scheduling, and time tracking all in one place. The first time I sent a proposal to a client, it was accepted, the contract signed, and the invoice paid within 5 minutes of me sending it.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
